memoryArtifacts.description: Robert I of Dreux, nicknamed the Great (c. 1123 – 11 October 1188), was the fifth son of Louis VI of France and Adélaide de Maurienne. Through his mother he was related to the Carolingians and to the …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux於1123年11月25日出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯布萊時，他的父親Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs41歲，母親Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France31歲。他於1145年與Hawise Salisbury結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1185年10月11日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪艾斯布萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux于1123年11月25日出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯布萊时，他的父亲Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs41岁，母亲Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France31岁。他于1145年与Hawise Salisbury结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1185年10月11日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪艾斯布萊。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

nameMeanings.name: dit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Dorothy
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

nameMeanings.name: 'le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Lewis   or respelling of   Lou  , as borne by the impresario  Lew Grade  (  1906–98 , originally  Louis Winogradsky ).

nameMeanings.name: Grand'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, common in Scotland, where it is the name of a famous clan. It is derived from a nickname meaning ‘large’ (Anglo-Norman grand). In the United States the name is sometimes bestowed in honour of the Civil War general and 18th president, Ulysses S. Grant ( 1822–85 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux was born on 25 November 1123, in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France, his father, Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs, was 41 and his mother, Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, was 31. He married Hawise Salisbury in 1145. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 11 October 1185, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux est né le 25 novembre 1123, à Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Hawise Salisbury en 1145. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 11 octobre 1185, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux am 25. November 1123 in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs 41 und seine Mutter Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France 31. Er hat 1145 Hawise Salisbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 11. Oktober 1185 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux è nato il il 25 novembre 1123 nel Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Hawise Salisbury nel 1145. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 11 ottobre 1185, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreuxが1123年11月25日にフランスピカーディエイスンブレアインで生まれた時，父Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francsは41歳，母Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de Franceは31歳であった。1145年にHawise Salisburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1185年10月11日に故郷で61歳で死去し，フランスピカーディエイスンブレアインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux(이)가 1123년 11월 25일 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 브레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1145년 Hawise Salisbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1185년 10월 11일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 브레이인에 묻혔다.

mn.25 November 1123–11 October 1185: 1123 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 25–1185 оны Аравдугаар сарын 11

pt.25 November 1123–11 October 1185: 25 de novembro de 1123–11 de outubro de 1185
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux nasceu em 25 de novembro de 1123, em Braine, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise Salisbury em 1145. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1185, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Braine, Aisne, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux родился 25 ноября 1123 г. в местности бреаин, эисн, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise Salisbury в 1145 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 11 октября 1185 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности бреаин, эисн, пикарди, Франция.

es.25 November 1123–11 October 1185: 25 de noviembre de 1123–11 de octubre de 1185
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux nació el 25 de noviembre de 1123, en Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Hawise Salisbury en 1145. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1185, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.
